meaning: n.[鍖朷姘板翱閰哥洂 姘板翱閰搁叝
examples: The content of P in melamine phosphate and the retained acid in melamine cyanurate were analyzed.
The effects of traditional PTFE micropowder and MP flame retardant on the fire resistance of melt drip of melamine cyanurate (MCA) flame retarding nylon 6 were studied.
